title: Dremisland 6pcs Italian Ruscus Greenery Stems, 27.6in Artificial Foliage Garland Green Vines Hanging Spray Branch Fake Leaves for Wedding Bouquet Arch Table Centerpieces Home Decor
features: [🌿Package & Size] Contains 6 artificial Italian Ruscus sprays, each is 27.6in/ 70cm. Each stem has 16 laterals and 112 pointed green leaves.

[🌿High-quality Material] The artificial foliages of these greenery stems are made of silk, which is soft and natural with clear lines. The stems are made of wire, wrapped in plastic, and can be adjusted to any shape as needed.

[🌿Realistic Appearance] The dense leaves are composed of different shades of green, making them natural, lifelike and full of texture. Faux greenery stems will not fall off, wither and will maintain vivid green for a very long time.

[🌿Ideal Wedding Decor] Italian Ruscus is a classic wedding decor for bouquets, floral arrangements, table centerpieces, arch, chair, wedding sign decorations and other backdrop decorations. It is also an ideal green filler for home, Christmas or other holiday decorations.

[🌿Fun to DIY] Italian Ruscus can be used with various kinds of artificial flowers, eucalyptus garlands and other artificial vines. Also, the length and shape of the stems can be freely adjusted, so that you can make flower arrangement or DIY wreath according to personal preferences.
description: Product Description Dremisland 6pcs Italian Ruscus Greenery Stems Artificial Garland Vines Spray Branch Bouquet Arch Table Decor The artificial Italian ruscus spays are lifelike ,UV resistant. You can bend the branches into any shapes you want.Also, the length and shape of the stems can be freely adjusted, to make flower arrangements easier. Note: The leaves may be squeezed due to long-time transportation. You can adjust the shape according to your preference. Artificial Italian Ruscus Greenery Garland Home Deocr Color: green Size: approx. 26" long for each spray Quantity: 6pcs artificial Italian ruscus sprays Material: Leaves are made of silk and the stems are made of iron wire wrapped with plastic Applications: Holiday decorations, wedding decorations, home decor With the different shades of green color and realistic veins, the artificial italian ruscus sprays are lifelike and natual , which could maintain vivid color for long time and add a dainty, soft touch to any flower arrangements. Realistic Look Perfect Filler Versatile Uses WEDDING DECORATION Italian Ruscus Sprays are ideal decorations for wedding bouquets, table centerpieces, arches, chairs, wedding sign decorations and other backdrop decorations. These vivid and lifelike greenery stems add a dainty and romantic touch to your wedding. HOME DECORATION These leaf vines are also an ideal green filler for home, Christmas or other holiday decorations. The artificial Italian Ruscus spays are UV resistant, which could maintain vivid color and make your room full of vitality for a long time. FLORAL ARRANGEMENT The Italian Ruscus leaves go well with eucalyptus leaves, willow leaves or any other artificial flowers and greeneries. The stems with built-in wires can be adjusted to any shape as needed, which makes them suitable for making wedding bouquets and DIY flower arrangements.
